title: mikania gracilipes
intro: Mikania gracilipes, also known as the Thai Mikania or Gracilipes Mikania, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, where its leaves and stems are valued for their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Mikania gracilipes include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and aid in the treatment of various infections, as well as its ability to promote digestive health and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Mikania gracilipes are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, or used as a topical cream or salve for skin conditions.
